Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.Qualifier

Packages that use Qualifier
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
 

Uses of Qualifier in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return types with arguments of type Qualifier
 java.util.Set<Qualifier> SupportedFeatures.getSupportedQualifiers()
          Provide the Set of supported Qualifiers.
 

Uses of Qualifier in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as Qualifier
static Qualifier PlayerEvent.DURATION_EXCEEDED
          Play ended because the maximum play duration time has been reached.
static Qualifier RecorderEvent.DURATION_EXCEEDED
          Record ended because the maximum record duration time has been reached.
static Qualifier PlayerEvent.END_OF_PLAY_LIST
          Indicate Play complete because all the streams played to completion.
static Qualifier SpeechDetectorConstants.END_OF_SPEECH_DETECTED
          SpeechDetector stopped because end of speech has been detected.
static Qualifier SpeechDetectorConstants.INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXPIRED
          SpeechDetector stopped because no speech has been detected before the initial timout popped.
static Qualifier RecorderEvent.PROMPT_FAILURE
          Returned by RecorderEvent.getQualifier() to indicate that the record operation was aborted because the prompt could not be played.
static Qualifier RecorderEvent.SILENCE
          Value for RecorderEvent.getQualifier().
static Qualifier SpeechDetectorConstants.SPEECH_DETECTED
          SpeechDetector detected speech.
 

Uses of Qualifier in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals declared as Qualifier
static Qualifier SignalDetectorEvent.DURATION_EXCEEDED
          Complete because total duration timeout (MAX_DURATION) exceeded.
static Qualifier SignalDetectorEvent.INITIAL_TIMEOUT_EXCEEDED
          Complete because initial signal timeout (INITIAL_TIMEOUT) exceeded.
static Qualifier SignalDetectorEvent.INTER_SIG_TIMEOUT_EXCEEDED
          Complete because inter signal timeout (INTER_SIG_TIMEOUT) exceeded.
static Qualifier SpeechRecognitionEvent.NO_GRAMMAR_MATCH
          This qualifier indicates that the recognizer could not match the input with any grammar.
static Qualifier SignalDetectorEvent.NUM_SIGNALS_DETECTED
          Complete because requested number of signals detected.
static Qualifier[] SignalDetectorEvent.PATTERN_MATCHING
          The array of pattern Qualifiers.
static Qualifier SignalDetectorEvent.PROMPT_FAILURE
          Returned by SignalDetectorEvent.getQualifier() to indicate that the receiveSignals operation was aborted because the prompt could not be played.
 

Uses of Qualifier in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection declared as Qualifier
static Qualifier SdpPortManagerEvent.OFFER_PARTIALLY_ACCEPTED
          ResourceEvent.getQualifier() returns this Qualifier to indicate that the offer is partially accepted (at least 1 Media description is accepted)
The application must use SdpPortManager.getMediaServerSessionDescription() to know what was accepted and what was rejected.
static Qualifier SdpPortManagerEvent.RESOURCE_PARTIALLY_AVAILABLE
          ResourceEvent.getQualifier() returns this Qualifier to indicate that a media resource cannot be allocated from the Media Server.
 

Uses of Qualifier in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.resource declared as Qualifier
static Qualifier ResourceEvent.NO_QUALIFIER
          Returned when no Qualifier is applicable (for example, when an error occurred).
static Qualifier ResourceEvent.RTC_TRIGGERED
          Qualifier: Completion caused by a Run-Time Control.
static Qualifier ResourceEvent.STOPPED
          Qualifier: Completion caused by a Stop.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.resource that return Qualifier
 Qualifier ResourceEvent.getQualifier()
          Get additional information about how/why a transaction terminated, the reason that causes this event.
